hooks.command: cd 'C:/Users/caitl/.claude' && git add -A 2>/dev/null && if git diff --staged --quiet 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi && msg=$(git diff --staged --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && git commit -m "Auto-update: $msg" 2>/dev/null && git push origin main --quiet 2>/dev/null || true
